mapper.insert:
SELECT support_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO support ( support_id, writer_id, support_type, title, content, status, created_at, delete_yn ) VALUES ( #{supportNo}, #{writerId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, '대기중', SYSDATE, 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT support_id AS supportNo, writer_id AS writerId, support_type AS category, title, content, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM support WHERE writer_id = #{writerId} AND delete_yn = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT support_id AS supportNo, writer_id AS writerId, support_type AS category, title, content, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM support WHERE support_id = #{supportId} AND delete_yn = 0
SELECT support_a_id AS answerId, support_id AS supportNo, member_id AS memberId, answer_content AS answerContent, created_at AS createdAt FROM support_answer WHERE support_id = #{supportNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO support_file ( file_id, support_id, file_name, file_ori_name, file_path, file_size, created_at ) VALUES ( support_file_seq.NEXTVAL, #{supportNo}, #{fileName}, #{fileOriName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS fileId, support_id AS supportNo, file_name AS fileName, file_ori_name AS fileOriName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, created_at AS createdAt FROM support_file WHERE support_id = #{supportNo} ORDER BY created_at ASC
